banner.title: SHS Enrollment
banner.subtitle: Ready for your future? Enroll in our specialized SHS tracks for SY 2026-2027.

options.title: Online SHS Forms
options.description: Choose your track and strand through our high-speed digital enrollment system.

options.title: Physical Enrollment
options.description: Visit the SHS Coordinator's office for personalized track counseling. You may also download the required forms below.

requirements.title: SHS Requirements
requirements.subtitle: Please prepare the following documents for Senior High School enrollment:

items.title: SF10 (Permanent Record)
items.description: Required for all students and transferees.

items.title: PSA Birth Certificate
items.description: Required for all students and transferees.

items.title: Completion Certificate
items.description: Optional requirement from Junior High School (Grade 10).
